---
name: "✨ Feature Request"
about: Suggest a new idea or improvement for the platform.
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## 📝 Description of the feature
A clear and concise description of what the feature is and how it should work.

## 🎯 Goal of the feature
What problem does this solve? What is the main objective or benefit of adding this?

## 📊 What is its impact?
Which parts of the platform will this affect?
- [ ] Matches
- [ ] Tournaments
- [ ] Players
- [ ] Teams
- [ ] UI/UX Improvements
- [ ] Other: (Please specify)

## 🤝 Are you willing to help?
Would you be able to contribute to the development of this feature (e.g., submitting a Pull Request, providing assets, or technical feedback)?
- [ ] Yes, I can help with development
- [ ] Yes, I can provide design/assets
- [ ] No, I'm just suggesting the idea

## 📖 Additional Context
Add any other context, mockups, or examples from other sites (like VLR or Liquipedia) that could help illustrate the request.
